chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Application No.566 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on M.A. No.6011/2025 (U/A) 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of M.A. No.9466/2023 --------------------------------------------- 02.05.2025 Mr. Zeeshan Asghar, advocate for applicant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh. ------------------------------ Learned counsel for applicant, under instructions, does not press the instant criminal miscellaneous application, which is accordingly dismissed along with pending applications. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
